title: Gorath

'''''Gorath''''' was a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] that served in the [[Grand Imperial Navy]] of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Foga Brill/Legends|Foga Brill]], the [[Moff/Legends|Governor]] of [[Prakith/Legends|Prakith]].

==Characteristics==
''Gorath'' was identified by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] personnel as a variant of the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]], but in Prakith service, the ship was designated as a [[Cruiser/Legends|light cruiser]] at less than 300 meters in length, and it was armed with eight primary [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries. ''Gorath'' also carried at least five [[breaching pod]]s, each of which could convey a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of assault troops to board another ship.

==History==
In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], the ''Gorath'' was considered a significantly newer vessel by the [[sensor master]] of the [[Adz-class patrol destroyer|patrol destroyer]] ''[[Tobay]]'', itself a ship of then-recent design. She was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Voba Dokrett]]. When the ''Gorath'' attacked the [[Teljkon Vagabond]], she was reduced to a hulk by the ancient ship's exotic weaponry, and most of her crew were slain.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''Gorath'' was also the name of a server—or "Galaxy"—in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.

It may be named after the 1962 Japanese science fiction film, ''[https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0056709/ Gorath]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
